data.title: MARA to Deploy 500 BTC With Two Prime for Generating Yields
data.description:
• Bitcoin miner MARA Holdings will provide 500 BTC to broker Two Prime for yield generation.
  • The partnership builds on Two Prime's existing role in providing bitcoin-backed loans to MARA.
  • MARA's recent first-quarter results missed Wall Street estimates, but analysts appreciated its cost-cutting measures.

data.title: BNB Surges 5% on Binance Ecosystem Strength as Bitcoin Extends Gains
data.description:
• BNB saw bullish momentum alongside Bitcoin’s rally, holding firm at key support levels despite brief pullbacks.
  • BNB Chain hit 8 million daily transactions and 2 million wallets, fueling ecosystem confidence and investor interest.

data.title: Crypto Trader Opens $1.1B Long Bitcoin Bet on Hyperliquid Using 40X Leverage
data.description:
• A trader named James Wynn has opened a $1.1 billion long position on Bitcoin using 40x leverage on the Hyperliquid platform.
  • The position, tied to the wallet address "0x507," is currently sitting on over $40 million in unrealized profit.
  • Hyperliquid's platform, built on the HyperEVM blockchain, offers features like real-time order books and deep liquidity without requiring KYC.

data.title: King Dollar Falls, Bitcoin Marches Toward Sound Money Highs
data.description:
• Bitcoin hit a new record against the dollar, but is still below its peak when measured against gold and silver and some other major currencies.
  • The bitcoin-to-gold ratio is currently 33.27 oz. of gold; the record high is over 40 oz. Against silver, the ratio is 3,300 oz., compared with a high of 3,530 oz.
  • BTC remains just under all-time highs in major fiat currencies such as the British pound and Swiss franc, indicating there's room for further appreciation.

data.title: Guatemala's Largest Bank Adopts Stablecoin Rails for U.S. Remittance Payments
data.description:
• Banco Industrial, Guatemala's largest bank, has adopted blockchain fintech company SukuPay's stablecoin rails for customers to send remittances from the U.S.
  • SukuPay is built on Polygon and uses the USDC stablecoin.
  • Remittances to Guatemala number around $21 billion annually, which is nearly 20% of the country's GDP.

data.title: Justin Sun Emerges as Donald Trump Memecoin's Top Holder With $21.9M Stake
data.description:
• Tron founder Justin Sun revealed he is the top holder of the TRUMP memecoin, with a Solana address associated with him holding approximately $21.9 million worth of the token
  • Being the top holder earns the Chinese-born crypto billionaire access to a private dinner and VIP reception with U.S. President Donald Trump.
  • Sun had previously invested $75 million in World Liberty Financial, a decentralized finance project backed by the Trump family, and has been credited for its success by the project's co-founder.

data.title: Bitcoin ‘Pizza’ Day is Now a $1.1B Celebration
data.description:
• Bitcoin reached a new all-time high of $111,800 on the 15th anniversary of Bitcoin Pizza Day.
  • In 2010, Laszlo Hanyecz made the first recorded commercial transaction with bitcoin, buying two pizzas for 10,000 BTC.
  • The 10,000 BTC used for the pizza purchase is now worth over $1.1 billion, highlighting the cryptocurrency's dramatic rise in value.

data.title: Bitcoin Options Open Interest Hit Record $42.5B on Deribit as Traders Eye Next Bull Target for BTC
data.description:
• Bitcoin's price surged to new highs above $111K, driving record activity in the Deribit options market.
  • The dollar value of open options contracts on Deribit reached a record $42.5 billion, indicating strong market interest.

data.title: Bitcoin's Rally to Record Highs Puts Focus on $115K Where an 'Invisible Hand' May Slow Bull Run
data.description:
• Bitcoin's price has reached record highs, surpassing $111,000.
  • Analysts predict Bitcoin could rally to $180,000 by year-end, driven by spot ETF inflows and institutional adoption.
  • Market makers' hedging activities at certain price levels may slow bitcoin's upward momentum.

data.title: Bitcoin Smashes Past $111K, Setting New Record Highs, on Institutional Fervor
data.description:
• Bitcoin reached an all-time high of $111,878, driven by institutional investment.
  • Public companies are increasingly using Bitcoin as a treasury asset, boosting demand.
  • JPMorgan Chase's involvement in Bitcoin signals a shift in traditional finance's view of crypto.
